productDisplayName: Puma Men Hypermoto Ducati Black Shoes
description: These stylish Hypermoto Ducati shoes from puma have a motorsport friendly design, and are perfect for both training and urban wear. These shoes are infused with the Ducati edge and their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and a tee for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and protection Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Foamstripes on either sides for style Branding appliqued on the tongue, Ducati logo on the side and heel counter Central lace ups for a snug and customised Fit TPU heatcut collar frame and synthetic trimmings Midsole Eco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioning Air capsule unit on the back EVA midsole for greater lightweight comfort Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a two piece pattern for greater traction Embedded part of the outsole has heeringbone grooves for maximum grip Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
